title: Mission & Vision - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Mission & Vision - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
Khoury College Mission & Vision
Computer science for everyone
In a world where computer science (CS) is everywhere, CS is for everyone. CS crosses every discipline and industry. It’s found in the networks that connect us, the data that fuels discoveries, and the technology that transforms society. That’s why we seek students with varied backgrounds and perspectives. Whether or not you have tech experience, Khoury College of Computer Sciences is for you — and we’ll provide the knowledge and know-how you need to make an impact.
Our mission:
To equip leaders to create computing systems that improve all aspects of life for all communities — ensuring equitable access to innovation that empowers and safeguards all people.
Our vision:
To usher in the next generation of computer scientists — moving beyond asking “can we” to more importantly asking “should we” — to create computing systems that benefit all of society.
Living our mission and vision every day
With close to 60 combined majors and nine campus locations, Khoury College realizes its mission and vision around the globe on a daily basis. Hear more about what makes Khoury College an innovative place to learn and how we are preparing the leaders of tomorrow.
